<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get an application by its ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/applications/{application_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves details about a specific application, including quotas and consumption statistics.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"application_id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"style":"simple"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"application_id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"consumption":{"type":"object","properties":{"events_per_day":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}},"name":{"type":"string"},"onboarding_steps":{"type":"object","properties":{"event":{"type":"string","enum":["ToDo","Done"]},"event_type":{"type":"string","enum":["ToDo","Done"]},"subscription":{"type":"string","enum":["ToDo","Done"]}},"required":["event","event_type","subscription"]},"organization_id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"quotas":{"type":"object","properties":{"days_of_events_retention_limit":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"events_per_day_limit":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"required":["days_of_events_retention_limit","events_per_day_limit"]}},"required":["application_id","consumption","name","onboarding_steps","organization_id","quotas"],"title":"ApplicationInfo"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"},"409":{"description":"Conflict"},"500":{"description":"Internal Server Error"}}}
>
